evals.prompt: I use KDE Konsole with bash on Fedora and I keep losing all my terminal tabs after reboot. Set up a robust restore system so my shell context and output are recoverable.
evals.expected_output: Produces a KDE/Konsole/tmux setup plan or implementation with tmux-resurrect, tmux-continuum, Konsole default profile, KDE session restore, and verification steps.

evals.prompt: Explain the difference between terminal, console, shell, bash, Konsole, and tmux, then tell me which layer should handle crash recovery.
evals.expected_output: Explains the layer model clearly and identifies tmux as the durable session layer while noting reboot cannot preserve arbitrary live processes.

evals.prompt: I want the same sustainable terminal setup on a new laptop, but I use WezTerm instead of Konsole. Give me the portable core and what changes for WezTerm.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the tmux core unchanged, adapts only the terminal startup/profile layer for WezTerm, and includes safe verification commands.
